Within few days the legislature will be asked by
tain boss barbers who fighting the BARRIERS union to
repeal the law prohibiting open shops Sunday and pro


The working for the repeal modification of the

the barber shops victory in the fight for repeal they
boast will break up the BARRIERS union in the state of
Washington.


Osensibly the two riders proposed for the bene-
fit of the general public which the enemies of the union
say is dying to be shaved on Sundays.


AS matter of fact it would the death of the law
which has operated benecay for the public has forced
sanitary to be taken in barber shops and has
given to them bill of health through the enforcing of
cleanliness and skilled attention.


c. L. Heady, boss barber of Seattle, is leading the
fight for repeal In Spokane, despite misrepresentation
he succeeded in getting the signatures of only few boss
BARRIERS.


Also he secured the support of the paper in the
state of Washington which the btterest enemy of organ
lied labor Banking this he will attempt to influence
Legislators to vote for the repeal


Union BARRIERS throughout the state have organized to
defeat the schemes of the few BOSSES Their unions will
send protests to Olympia.


In this the union BARRIERS will be given the heartiest
support not only by the labor organizations of the state
but by every who believes that Sunday should be
day of rest that barber shops should be clean and SAM
tary that BARRIERS should be pronounced fit before they
touch customers beard or hair.


The Press joins in the slogan
( DEFEAT THE PEPEAL MEASURE!
